description: Create a dimensioned 2D floor plan of an office room. Draw a 5000 mm by 4000 mm rectangle starting at (0,0) and a hexagonal meeting table with a 600 mm radius centered at (2500, 2000). Include a dimension for the 5000 mm width on the bottom wall. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/office_layout.FCStd and export the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/office_layout.dxf.
